title: Why Students Choose
subtitle: Pakrashi Computer Academy
description: Choosing the right guidance is important for success in academics and career. Pakrashi Computer Academy has become a trusted learning center for many students because of its commitment to quality education and personalized support.

features.title: Experienced and Qualified Faculty
features.description: Classes are conducted by a highly qualified instructor with M.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, ensuring strong conceptual understanding for students.

aim.title: Our Aim
aim.description: The primary aim of Pakrashi Computer Academy is to empower students with practical, industry-relevant computer education that builds confidence, enhances employability, and prepares them for real-world challenges. We strive to bridge the gap between academic knowledge and professional skills by providing quality training in various domains of computer science and information technology.

objectives.title: Skill-Based Learning
objectives.description: To provide hands-on training in essential computer applications such as MS Office, programming, data analysis, and modern tools so that students gain practical expertise, not just theoretical knowledge.

objectives.title: Career-Oriented Education
objectives.description: To guide students from school, college, and technical backgrounds (BCA, B.Tech, Diploma, MCA, etc.) towards building strong careers in IT and related fields.

objectives.title: Strong Conceptual Foundation
objectives.description: To ensure students understand the fundamentals clearly, helping them excel in academics, competitive exams, and professional environments.

objectives.title: Affordable & Accessible Education
objectives.description: To make quality computer education available to all students at an affordable cost, especially in local and semi-urban areas.

objectives.title: Confidence & Personality Development
objectives.description: To develop communication skills, problem-solving ability, and confidence among students, preparing them for interviews and workplace challenges.

objectives.title: Technology Awareness & Innovation
objectives.description: To keep students updated with the latest technologies and encourage innovative thinking and project-based learning.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To build strong technical foundations in Computer Science and help students achieve academic success with confidence.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a trusted center of excellence in computer education where students not only learn but grow into skilled professionals ready to succeed in the digital world.

rules.description: Parents are requested to refrain from waiting in the classroom while the classes are going on. You are requested to come on time to pick up your child.
Students must behave well in class. Parents will be responsible for any damage to property and injury to others caused by their children.
Student must be on time for class. In case the student is late by 15 minutes he/she will not be allowed in the class.

Students who wish to go on leave must submit an advance leave application to avail the compensatory classes. Compensatory classes will be held only when there is a genuine reason for taking leave and will be at the sole discretion of academy in charge.
All fees are non refundable & non transferable. No refund of fees will be given if a student discontinues in between.
Academy in charge reserves all rights to cancel reschedule / merge any student(s)/batch from one class/batch to another.
School students (Class V to Class XII) are not allowed to use mobile phone in the classroom.

A student who stops attending classes without informing in writing for more than 4 classes will be treated as discontinued / dropout. If such student wishes to rejoin, he /she will have to pay the full registration fees.
Pakrashi Computer Academy reserves the right to make changes in the institute rules, which will be communicated to students and parents and shall be binding to all.
